name: Gold Pawn Cypress
description_short: Gold Pawn Cypress is a pawn shop in Fort Lauderdale offering collateral-based loans and gold/jewelry buying services with a 4.8-star customer rating.
description_long:
Gold Pawn Cypress operates as a pawn shop located in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, serving the local community's collateral-based lending needs. The business is situated at 950 NE 62nd St and maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week to accommodate customer traffic. With a 4.8-star rating based on 66 Google reviews, the shop has established a reputation for customer service in the pawn lending space. The company's contact information and physical location make it accessible to Fort Lauderdale residents seeking immediate cash solutions.

The shop provides traditional pawn shop services, including collateral-based loans where customers can pledge items of value—typically gold, jewelry, electronics, or other personal property—in exchange for immediate cash. Customers have the flexibility to reclaim their items by repaying the loan amount plus applicable fees and interest within a specified timeframe. This model serves as an alternative to traditional lending for consumers who need quick cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes.

Gold Pawn Cypress distinguishes itself through its high customer satisfaction rating of 4.8 stars across 66 reviews, suggesting strong customer service and fair dealing compared to other pawn operations. The consistent weekday hours (10AM-7PM) provide reliable accessibility for working customers. The business appears to focus on building a local reputation through positive customer experiences in a competitive pawn shop market.

As a pawn shop, Gold Pawn Cypress is best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items they can temporarily part with. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve interest and fees, and failure to repay results in loss of the collateral. Customers should carefully evaluate whether the cost of borrowing aligns with their financial situation, and should only pledge items they can afford to lose.
pros: High customer satisfaction with 4.8-star rating based on 66 verified Google reviews
Accessible location in Fort Lauderdale at 950 NE 62nd St with clear phone contact
Consistent business hours (10AM-7PM Monday-Wednesday minimum) for weekday accessibility
No credit checks required for collateral-based loans, serving customers with poor credit
Immediate cash availability without lengthy approval processes typical of traditional lending
cons: Pawn loans carry interest and fees that add to the total repayment amount
Pledged items are forfeited if the loan is not repaid within the agreed timeframe
Limited information available about specific loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures on the website
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and not suitable for long-term financial needs
Customer must own valuable items of sufficient worth to qualify for desired loan amount
best_for: Consumers who own valuable items (jewelry, gold, electronics) and need immediate short-term cash
Individuals with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
People facing urgent financial needs (emergency expenses, temporary cash flow gaps) requiring same-day funds
diagnosis: Gold Pawn Cypress is best for Fort Lauderdale residents who own valuable items and need immediate cash without credit checks or bank approval. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term solutions with interest and fees, and unpaid loans result in permanent loss of the pledged item—making this suitable only for customers with truly urgent needs who can afford repayment.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans using gold, jewelry, and personal property as security
Short-term secured loans with item redemption options
Loan renewal and extension services (standard pawn practice)
